chapters.title: Small Beginning
chapters.content: Three friends started their company inside a small garage with two laptops, one whiteboard, and a very ambitious idea.

chapters.title: Long Nights
chapters.content: They worked late every night, fixing bugs, improving designs, and learning how difficult building a startup could be.

chapters.title: First Investor
chapters.content: Months later, after many failed meetings, one investor finally believed in the project. The garage dream was becoming real.
